subject: refactor(api): remove all direct Supabase data operations, write backend spec
body:
Frontend now uses tool-till-tees REST API exclusively for all data
operations. Supabase client is used only for auth and realtime
subscriptions. Missing API capabilities (validation fields, new
endpoints, unscoped GETs) are spec'd in SPEC_tool_till_tees_additions.md
for the backend team to implement.

Tags: api, migration, backend-spec, cleanup
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: api
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: api-migration
Semver: major
